## Checklist

- [ ] My commits follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/).
- [ ] `pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test` pass locally.
- [ ] `cargo fmt` and `cargo clippy` pass (if I touched Rust).
- [ ] I updated the [IPC contract](../packages/core/src/ipc/contract.ts) and **both** backends if I added a capability.
- [ ] I updated documentation in `docs/` where relevant.
